creator: nmingotti@gmail.com
text:
After applying "Tomo Method" and a full day of use 
I can state that:

1] The hanging frequency was drastically reduced in general,
i would say the problem almost disappeared. 

2] In web.whatsapp.com website the hang frequency reduced
sensibly but still remains, it hanged a couple of times once
the application was already started.
To have the application working I had to load/kill the page 4-5 times.
